title: British Museum postpones talk on Ancient Israel due to security
description: British Museum postpones an "Ancient Israel" lecture due to threats of deliberate disruption.

title: The Assyrians: The Civilization That Terrorized the Ancient World
Pacific island climate fund invests in fossil fuels
description: SYDNEY - A trust fund set up to help a South Pacific island nation gravely threatened by climate change has invested in coal mining, gas exploration and the world’s largest crude oil refinery, an AFP investigation has revealed.

title: Fund for climate-exposed Pacific nation invests in fossil fuels
description: A trust fund set up to help a South Pacific nation gravely threatened by climate change has invested in coal mining, gas exploration and the world's largest crude oil refinery.

title: Fund for climate-exposed Pacific nation invests in fossil fuels
